top_signals.title: Policy paper: UK–Australia Investment Partnership Memorandum of Understanding
top_signals.summary: Australia and the United Kingdom have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to support greater investment between superannuation and pension funds in both countries.

top_signals.title: Reform panel calls for easing data center building standards
top_signals.summary: The panel's proposal urged the government to exclude lithium-ion batteries from the restrictions by introducing safety standards for batteries.

top_signals.title: Nigeria identifies major new critical minerals district, large lithium discovery
top_signals.summary: The African country said its Kaduna state represents a "world-class" mineral province and one of the most significant discoveries in recent years.
